verdict: This polyphenol duo offers synergistic antioxidant protection with anti-aging properties backed by research. However, both actives are notoriously unstable, and serum shelf-life significantly impacts efficacy—proper storage is critical.

_research.name: Resveratrol + Ferulic Acid Antioxidant Serum
_research.con: Resveratrol and ferulic acid degrade rapidly with light/air exposure, requiring careful storage.
